notes: All 212 PDF pages are enumerated and the source is renderable from the ignored Copyparty local hint, but pages remain pending until bounded vision extraction and independent verification produce committed evidence.
acceptance_blockers: No AiG page/block evidence has been independently verified yet.
Legacy AiG raw records remain source_blocked until bounded evidence is promoted.
Rendering is permitted for bounded evidence work, but app-facing promotion remains blocked.
